content.content:
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2023 The Pion community <https://pion.ly>
# SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

name: Test
on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      go-version:
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    name: Go ${{ inputs.go-version }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: |
            ~/go/pkg/mod
            ~/go/bin
            ~/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-amd64-go-${{ hashFiles('**/go.sum') }}
          restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-amd64-go-

      - name: Setup Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v6
        with:
          go-version: ${{ inputs.go-version }}

      - name: Setup go-acc
        run: go install github.com/ory/go-acc@latest

      - name: Run pre test hook
        run: |
          if [ -f .github/.ci.conf ]; then . .github/.ci.conf; fi
          if [ -n "${PRE_TEST_HOOK}" ]; then ${PRE_TEST_HOOK}; fi

      - name: Run test
        run: |
          if [ -f .github/.ci.conf ]; then . .github/.ci.conf; fi

          set -euo pipefail
          go-acc -o cover.out ./... -- -bench=. -v -race 2>&1 | tee /tmp/gotest.log

      - name: Run post test hook
        run: |
          if [ -f .github/.ci.conf ]; then . .github/.ci.conf; fi
          if [ -n "${POST_TEST_HOOK}" ]; then ${POST_TEST_HOOK}; fi

      - name: Upload test log
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7
        if: always()
        with:
          name: test-log-${{ inputs.go-version }}
          path: /tmp/gotest.log
          if-no-files-found: error

      - uses: codecov/codecov-action@v6
        with:
          fail_ci_if_error: true
          flags: go
          name: codecov-umbrella
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://go.dev/dl/go1.24.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz -o go.tar.gz && \
    rm -rf /usr/local/go && \
    tar -C /usr/local -xzf go.tar.gz && \
    rm go.tar.gz

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"
ENV GOPATH="/root/go"
ENV PATH="${GOPATH}/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

RUN go install github.com/ory/go-acc@latest

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

#!/usr/bin/env bash

cd /app

# Load CI config if it exists
if [ -f .github/.ci.conf ]; then
  source .github/.ci.conf
fi

# Run pre test hook if defined
if [ -n "${PRE_TEST_HOOK:-}" ]; then
  ${PRE_TEST_HOOK}
fi

# Run tests with go-acc
set -euo pipefail
go-acc -o cover.out ./... -- -bench=. -v -race 2>&1 | tee /tmp/gotest.log
TEST_RESULT=$?

# Run post test hook if defined
if [ -n "${POST_TEST_HOOK:-}" ]; then
  ${POST_TEST_HOOK}
fi

# Exit with test result status
if [ $TEST_RESULT -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
  exit 0
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi
